streams.name: Mitchell Landscape Architecture
streams.notes: Seasonal — strong Q1/Q3, slower Feb. Set aside 30% for taxes and SEP IRA. Q1 average: $8,133/mo (Jan $9,200, Feb $6,800, Mar $8,400).

streams.name: Rental Property - Oak Street
streams.notes: Gross rent $1,850/mo. Rental mortgage $1,500/mo. Net cash flow ~$350/mo before maintenance and property tax.
